title: Sheet iron pickaxe
description: Makes the iron pickaxe craftable with iron sheets.
body:
Makes the iron pickaxe only craftable with iron sheets from the create mod instead of pure iron ingots.
Pairs well with a mod that adds copper tools.

REQUIRES [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

![recipe of iron pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/912680a3c26f697709f8b14cc7f898d0ac92c7f3.png)

If you want this to apply to iron armor check out [this mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sheet-iron-armor)
